retry_reason: The only path where nothing happens is when as is NULL; retrying would not change the NULL condition.
contract_summary: This is a destructor wrapper for struct afs_super_info. It releases the reference to the volume via afs_put_volume, unuses the cell via afs_unuse_cell, and puts the network namespace via put_net. After these puts, it frees the afs_super_info structure. The function is safe to call on NULL pointers (no-op). After a successful call, the as pointer becomes invalid and must not be dereferenced. Callers must have obtained the references to volume, cell, and net_ns before constructing the super_info, and this function ensures their proper release when the superblock is destroyed.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to release references on volume, cell, and net_ns held by the afs_super_info, then free the structure. All non-refcount logic is the null check and kfree, which are standard cleanup steps.
